pokemon:charjabug.name: Charjabug
pokemon:charjabug.summary: From the food it digests, it generates electricity, and it stores this energy in its electric sac.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: From the food it digests, it generates electricity, and it stores this energy in its electric sac.
Its digestive processes convert the leaves it eats into electricity. An electric sac in its belly stores the electricity for later use.
Its body is capable of storing electricity. On camping trips, people are grateful to have one around.
While its durable shell protects it from attacks, Charjabug strikes at enemies with jolts of electricity discharged from the tips of its jaws.
Its stout shell provides excellent defense from attacks. It uses electricity on persistent opponents.
It buries itself in fallen leaves and barely moves, munching away on humus. If you accidentally step on one, you’ll get a shock!

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: From the food it digests, it generates electricity, and it stores this energy in its electric sac.

pokemon:grubbin.name: Grubbin
pokemon:grubbin.summary: They often gather near places frequented by electric Pokémon in order to avoid being attacked by bird Pokémon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: They often gather near places frequented by electric Pokémon in order to avoid being attacked by bird Pokémon.
It uses its big jaws to dig nests into the forest floor, and it loves to feed on sweet tree sap.
Its strong jaw enables it to scrape trees and slurp out the sap. It normally lives underground.
Its natural enemies, like Rookidee, may flee rather than risk getting caught in its large mandibles that can snap thick tree branches.
It spits a sticky thread to stop opponents in their tracks, and then it grabs them in its sharp, sturdy mandibles to take them down.
If you find its nest, you shouldn’t stick your hand inside. You’ll get bitten by an irritated Grubbin.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: They often gather near places frequented by electric Pokémon in order to avoid being attacked by bird Pokémon.

pokemon:vikavolt.name: Vikavolt
pokemon:vikavolt.summary: It produces electricity via an electrical organ in its abdomen. It overwhelms bird Pokémon with shocking beams of electrical energy.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It produces electricity via an electrical organ in its abdomen. It overwhelms bird Pokémon with shocking beams of electrical energy.
If it carries a Charjabug to use as a spare battery, a flying Vikavolt can rapidly fire high-powered beams of electricity.
It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies.
It builds up electricity in its abdomen, focuses it through its jaws, and then fires the electricity off in concentrated beams.
Vikavolt flusters opponents with acrobatic flying maneuvers. This creates an opening for it to deliver an electric beam attack.
It has an organ that generates electricity in its abdomen. It concentrates energy in its strong jaws and fires off powerful jolts of electricity.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It produces electricity via an electrical organ in its abdomen. It overwhelms bird Pokémon with shocking beams of electrical energy.
